Lulogooli: Avandu vanyingi vamali kokora kuli vanyara kong'oda amakuva gi ivindu viekoleka hagati hiitu.
English: Many people have done their best to write a report of the things that have taken place among us.

Lulogooli: Vang'oda ivindu via kwavolerwa na yavo avaari avaloli va moni na moni vi vindu yivio kutura mulitanga.
English: They wrote what we have been told by those who saw these things from the beginning and who proclaimed the message.

Lulogooli: Inzi kandi O, Wuluyali Zeofilo, mali mulihenzeriza ligali nokolohiza vindu yivi viosi kutura mulitanga.
English: And so, Your Excellency, because I have carefully studied all these matters from their beginning, I thought it would be good to write an orderly account for you.

Lulogooli: Ngoli ndio kunangwa uduuki kumanya agiligali gi ivindu viosi via wigizwa.
English: I do this so that you will know the full truth about everything which you have been taught.

Lulogooli: Mu madiku ga Herodi yaali Mwami Munene wi Vuyuda.
English: During the time when Herod was king of Judea.

Lulogooli: Yaali ho musaalisi mulala walangwa Zakaria.
English: There was a priest named Zechariah.

Lulogooli: Kutura ku avinyumba yu musaalisi Abija.
English: Who belonged to the priestly order of Abijah.
His wife's name was Elizabeth.

Lulogooli: Yaali mulala ku avakaana vi kisukururwi chu Musaalisi Haruni.
English: She also belonged to a priestly family.

Lulogooli: Vosi vaali avalungi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: They both lived good lives in God's sight.

Lulogooli: Vatia ligali nokolonda malago na makuva gu Mwami vugira imbara.
English: They obeyed fully all the Lord's laws and commands.
They had no children.
Elizabeth could not have any (she was barren).
They were both very old.

Lulogooli: Lidiku lilala Zakaria yaali naakoraa miyinzi ju vusaalisi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: One day Zechariah was doing his work as a priest in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Mu Litembeli kuli lilohiza lia vuli lidiku lialange.
English: Taking his turn in the daily service.

Lulogooli: Yatovolwa nikura kuli mwima gwu vusaalisi.
English: He was chosen by lot to burn incense.
So he went into the Temple of the Lord.
To burn incense on the altar.

Lulogooli: Kiduma kenene chavandu vaali ni vasaala ichova ing'inga yukusaamba kimuli.
English: The crowd of people outside prayed during the hour when the incense was burned.
An angel of the Lord appeared to him.

Lulogooli: Nasingiyi ku mukono mulungi gwu vwali.
English: Standing at the right side of the altar.
Where the incense was burned.

Lulogooli: Lwa Zakaria yamulola, yahenda mwoyo kandi naatia ligali.
English: When Zechariah saw him, he was alarmed and felt afraid.
But the angel said to him, Don't be afraid, Zechariah!
God has heard your prayer.

Lulogooli: Mukali woovo Sabeti alakwivulira mwana muyaayi.
English: Your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son.
You are to name him John.
How glad and happy you will be.

Lulogooli: Avandu vanyingi valakasangala ku liivulwa lilie.
English: How happy many others will be when he is born!
John will be great in the Lord's sight.

Lulogooli: Si alinwa iwaini anoho amalwa mba.
English: He must not drink any wine or strong drink.

Lulogooli: Aliizula Roho Mutakatifu kutura munda mwa mama weve.
English: From his very birth he will be filled with the Holy Spirit.

Lulogooli: Aliranyia avanyingi ku avandu va Isiraeli ku Mwami Nyasaye wavo.
English: He will bring back many of the people of Israel to the Lord their God.

Lulogooli: Alimiira imbiri wu Mwami weve nu mwoyo kandi ni zinguru.
English: He will go ahead of the Lord, strong and mighty.

Lulogooli: Alakahambanyie avababa na avana vaavo kandi.
English: He will bring fathers and children together again.

Lulogooli: Alalomba avibaali na avatatiizaa Nyasaye vaganagane.
English: He will turn disobedient people back to the way of thinking of the righteous.
He will get the Lord's people ready for him.

Lulogooli: Zakaria yateeva Engelosi, Inzi ndamanya ndi amakuva yaga?
English: Zechariah said to the angel, How shall I know if this is so?

Lulogooli: Inzi mbeeye musakulu na mukali wange yakeera.
English: I am an old man, and my wife is old also.

Lulogooli: Inzi mbeeye Gabirieli usingiraa imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: I am Gabriel, I stand in the presence of God.
I was sent to speak to you.
I bring you this good news.
Behold, you will be silent (mute).
You will be unable to speak until the day these things happen.
Because you have not believed my message.
In the meantime the people were waiting for Zechariah.

Lulogooli: Vagenya ku lilindagilira lilie mu Litembeli.
English: They wondered why he was spending such a long time in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Lwa yatura ichova, siyaali anyala komoloma navo mba.
English: When he came out, he could not speak to them.

Lulogooli: Vamanya ndi aloli malola mu Litembeli.
English: They knew that he had seen a vision in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Yagelagela vuzwa makono ma namenya naveeye idimbidi.
English: Unable to say a word, he made signs to them with his hands.

Lulogooli: Lwa yamala madiku geege guvutumiki mu Litembeli yirana yengo weve.
English: When his period of service in the Temple was over, he went back home.

Lulogooli: Inyima wa madiku yago, mukali weve, Sabeti yavereka.
English: Some time later his wife Elizabeth became pregnant.
She did not leave the house for five months.

Lulogooli: Kalunu Mwami amali kumanyia zimbavasi zizie ku inzi.
English: Now at last the Lord has helped me (shown mercy).

Lulogooli: Anduliziyi zisoni ziambezaa nazio imbiri wa vandu.
English: He has taken away my public disgrace!

Lulogooli: Mu mweli gwa sita Sabeti naveeye ninda.
English: In the sixth month Elizabeth was pregnant.

Lulogooli: Engelosi Gabirieli yatumwa na Nyasaye kuzia Nazareti.
English: God sent the angel Gabriel to Nazareth.
A town in Galilee.

Lulogooli: Yaali na makuva ku mukaana mugima, uwalangwa Maria.
English: To a young woman (virgin) named Mary.

Lulogooli: Uwaali niyateevwa koleetwa nu mundu mulala uwalangwa Josefu.
English: Who was promised in marriage to a man named Joseph.
A descendant of King David.

Lulogooli: Engelosi yazia kuye namuvolera, Mirembe Maria!
English: The angel came to her and said, Peace be with you (Greetings Mary)!
The Lord is with you and has greatly blessed you!
The Lord is with you.

Lulogooli: Lwa Maria yahulira amakuva yaga, yaahenda mwoyo ligali.
English: Mary was deeply troubled by the angel's message.

Lulogooli: Yaganagana mumwoyo ichi licheliza yili livoora!
English: She wondered what his words meant!
The angel said to her, Don't be afraid, Mary.
God has been gracious to you.

Lulogooli: Henza! Ivi ulavereka na ulivuula mwana muyaayi.
English: Behold! You will become pregnant and give birth to a son.
You will name him Jesus.
He will be great and will be called the Son.

Lulogooli: Muyaayi wa Nyasaye Oveeye igulu Ligali.
English: The Son of the Most High God.

Lulogooli: Mwami Nyasaye alakamukole alave Mwami kuli guuga weve Daudi.
English: The Lord God will make him a king, as his ancestor David was.

Lulogooli: Alakamiihi ku avandu va Isiraeli mihiga ni mihiga.
English: He will be the king of the descendants of Jacob forever.
His kingdom will never end!

Lulogooli: Maria yateeva engelosi, Yaga galanyalika ndi?
English: Mary said to the angel, How can this be?
Since I am a virgin?
The Holy Spirit will come on you.

Lulogooli: Zinguru zia Nyasaye oveeye igulu Ligali zilakukinga kuli kiriri.
English: The power of the Most High God will rest upon you.

Lulogooli: Mwana wa ulivuula alakalangwe Mutakatifu, Mwana wa Nyasaye.
English: The holy child will be called the Son of God.

Lulogooli: Umanye kali Sabeti mwiko woovo, umali kovereka mwana muyaayi.
English: Remember your relative Elizabeth, she is also pregnant with a son.

Lulogooli: Yigu nu mweli gwigwe gwa sita.
English: This is her sixth month.
Though she was called barren.

Lulogooli: Kigira ku Nyasaye, si keveeye ho kindu ikitanyalikaa mba.
English: For there is nothing that God cannot do.

Lulogooli: Henza inzi mbeeye mutumikiri wu Mwami.
English: I am the Lord's servant.

Lulogooli: Gave ku inzi kuli aga ovooye.
English: May it happen to me as you have said.

Lulogooli: Maria yetegeka, nalomba logendo kuzia vwangu.
English: Mary got ready and hurried off.

Lulogooli: Lidaala lilala liveeye muvigulu vie Vuyuda.
English: To a town in the hill country of Judea.

Lulogooli: Yingira munyumba ya Zakaria, nacheliza Sabeti.
English: She went into Zechariah's house and greeted Elizabeth.

Lulogooli: Lwa Sabeti yahulira licheliza lia Maria, mwana yakina nuvuyanzi munda mwimwe.
English: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, the baby moved within her.
Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.
She cried out with a loud voice.

Lulogooli: Ivi ugasiziywi ligali hagati ha vakali vosi.
English: You are the most blessed of all women.
Blessed is the child you will bear!

Lulogooli: Inzi nivwaha kali mama wu Mwami wange yaaze ku inzi?
English: Why should the mother of my Lord come to visit me?

Lulogooli: Lwa mbuliyi mwoyo gwi licheliza liilio, mwana akini munda mwange nuvuyanzi.
English: As soon as I heard your greeting, the baby jumped with gladness.

Lulogooli: Oveeye nuvugasu ivi uwa suuvira ndi.
English: How happy you are to believe the Lord.
My heart praises the Lord.

Lulogooli: Mwoyo gwange gusangali kigira nu Nyasaye, Muhonyi wange.
English: My soul is glad because of God my Savior.

Lulogooli: Kigira wizulizi Iiiva liu vwegehizi vwange.
English: For he has remembered me, his lowly servant!
I am his servant girl!

Lulogooli: Kigira kutura kalunu amakura ga avandu vosi galananga, vuyanzi.
English: From now on all generations will call me blessed (happy).

Lulogooli: Kigira Nyasaye Wizingulu angoleeye vindu vinene.
English: For the Mighty God has done great things for me.
His name is holy.

Lulogooli: Zimbavasi zizie ziveeye ku makura namakura.
English: His mercy is from generation to generation.
To those who honor (fear) him.

Lulogooli: Akoli vindu vie zinguru nu mukono gwigwe.
English: He has performed mighty deeds with his arm.

Lulogooli: Usalanyi avigingiri mu zing'anagani zie mioyo jaavo.
English: He has scattered the proud in their own plans.

Lulogooli: Waguluyi avami vizingulu kutura ku zindeve ziavo ziu vwami.
English: He has brought down mighty kings from their thrones.
But he has lifted up the lowly.
He has filled the hungry with good things.

Lulogooli: O, uvukungi avatugi amakono vugira kindu.
English: He sent the rich away with empty hands.

Lulogooli: Vaduukiza lilagana lia yalagana na vaguuga.
English: He has kept the promise he made to our ancestors.

Lulogooli: Umali kuza kokonya mutumikiri weve Isiraeli.
English: He has come to the help of his servant Israel.
He has remembered to show mercy.

Lulogooli: Ku Aburahamu ni visukululwi vivie mihiga ni mihiga!
English: To Abraham and his descendants forever!

Lulogooli: Maria yamenya na Sabeti ku ing'inga iduuka imieli jivaga.
English: Mary stayed about three months with Elizabeth.

Lulogooli: Ing'inga ya Sabeti yu kwivura yaduuka.
English: The time came for Elizabeth to have her baby.

Lulogooli: Vaza kokeva mwana, ni venya ku mugulika Zakaria.
English: They came to circumcise him and name him Zechariah.
The name of his father.
No! His name is to be John.

Lulogooli: Simuveeye nu mwiko ulangwa lieta yili mba?
English: Is there no relative with that name?

Lulogooli: Vagelera baba weve amakono ni vamuteeva lieta liagulika mwana weve.
English: They made signs to his father to ask what the name should be.
His name is John.

Lulogooli: Munwa gwa Zakaria gwigulika nululimi lwilwe lwanguha.
English: Immediately Zechariah was able to speak again.
Fear came upon all the neighbors.

Lulogooli: Makuva yaga galandizwa mu kivala choosi chu muvigulu Ivuyuda.
English: This news spread through all the hill country of Judea.

Lulogooli: Mwana uyu aliva mundu wa lugano ki?
English: What then will this child be?

Lulogooli: Zakaria, baba wu mwana, yizula Roho Mutakatifu na yaporofeta.
English: Zechariah, the father, was filled with the Holy Spirit and prophesied.
Praise the Lord, the God of Israel.

Lulogooli: Umali kogeniha kandi ohonyi avandu veve.
English: He has come to the help of his people and set them free.

Lulogooli: Okoheeye muhonyi wi zinguru kutura mukisukululwi cha Daudi.
English: He has provided a mighty Savior from the house of David.
He will save us from our enemies.
He shows mercy to our ancestors.

Lulogooli: Liesuuha lia yisuhira Aburahamu guuga wiitu.
English: The oath which he swore to our ancestor Abraham.
To grant us rescue from our enemies.
To deliver us from the hands of our enemies.
To serve him without fear.

Lulogooli: Kuva avatakatifu kandi avalungi imbiri weve.
English: To be holy and righteous in his sight.

Lulogooli: Ulalangwa muporofeti wa Nyasaye Oveeye igulu Ligali.
English: You, my child, will be called a prophet of the Most High.

Lulogooli: Ulazia imbiri wu Mwami kumulombera zinzira zizie.
English: You will go before the Lord to prepare his way.
His people will know they are saved by the forgiveness of sins.

Lulogooli: Nyasaye wiitu aveeye wi zimbavasi kandi umulahi.
English: Our God is merciful and tender.

Lulogooli: Alalomba vulavu vwovohonyi vwake ku kunyi kutura mwigulu.
English: He causes the light from heaven to shine on us.

Lulogooli: Kwimilira virenge vietu munzira yi mirembe.
English: To guide our steps into the path of peace.

Lulogooli: Mwana yaviruka, nanyoora zinguru mu Roho.
English: The child grew and became strong in spirit.

Lulogooli: Zinguru zia Nyasaye oveeye igulu Ligali zilakukinga kuli kiriri.
English: The power of the Most High God will rest upon you.

Lulogooli: Mwana wa ulivuula alakalangwe Mutakatifu, Mwana wa Nyasaye.
English: The holy child will be called the Son of God.

Lulogooli: Umanye kali Sabeti mwiko woovo, umali kovereka mwana muyaayi.
English: Remember your relative Elizabeth, she is also pregnant with a son.

Lulogooli: Yigu nu mweli gwigwe gwa sita.
English: This is her sixth month.
Though she was called barren.

Lulogooli: Kigira ku Nyasaye, si keveeye ho kindu ikitanyalikaa mba.
English: For there is nothing that God cannot do.

Lulogooli: Henza inzi mbeeye mutumikiri wu Mwami.
English: I am the Lord's servant.

Lulogooli: Gave ku inzi kuli aga ovooye.
English: May it happen to me as you have said.

Lulogooli: Maria yetegeka, nalomba logendo kuzia vwangu.
English: Mary got ready and hurried off.

Lulogooli: Lidaala lilala liveeye muvigulu vie Vuyuda.
English: To a town in the hill country of Judea.

Lulogooli: Yingira munyumba ya Zakaria, nacheliza Sabeti.
English: She went into Zechariah's house and greeted Elizabeth.

Lulogooli: Lwa Sabeti yahulira licheliza lia Maria, mwana yakina nuvuyanzi munda mwimwe.
English: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, the baby moved within her.
Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.
She cried out with a loud voice.

Lulogooli: Ivi ugasiziywi ligali hagati ha vakali vosi.
English: You are the most blessed of all women.
Blessed is the child you will bear!

Lulogooli: Inzi nivwaha kali mama wu Mwami wange yaaze ku inzi?
English: Why should the mother of my Lord come to visit me?

Lulogooli: Lwa mbuliyi mwoyo gwi licheliza liilio, mwana akini munda mwange nuvuyanzi.
English: As soon as I heard your greeting, the baby jumped with gladness.

Lulogooli: Oveeye nuvugasu ivi uwa suuvira ndi.
English: How happy you are to believe the Lord.
My heart praises the Lord.

Lulogooli: Mwoyo gwange gusangali kigira nu Nyasaye, Muhonyi wange.
English: My soul is glad because of God my Savior.

Lulogooli: Avandu vanyingi vamali kokora kuli vanyara kong'oda amakuva gi ivindu viekoleka hagati hiitu.
English: Many people have done their best to write a report of the things that have taken place among us.

Lulogooli: Vang'oda ivindu via kwavolerwa na yavo avaari avaloli va moni na moni vi vindu yivio kutura mulitanga.
English: They wrote what we have been told by those who saw these things from the beginning and who proclaimed the message.

Lulogooli: Inzi kandi O, Wuluyali Zeofilo, mali mulihenzeriza ligali nokolohiza vindu yivi viosi kutura mulitanga.
English: And so, Your Excellency, because I have carefully studied all these matters from their beginning, I thought it would be good to write an orderly account for you.

Lulogooli: Ngoli ndio kunangwa uduuki kumanya agiligali gi ivindu viosi via wigizwa.
English: I do this so that you will know the full truth about everything which you have been taught.

Lulogooli: Mu madiku ga Herodi yaali Mwami Munene wi Vuyuda.
English: During the time when Herod was king of Judea.

Lulogooli: Yaali ho musaalisi mulala walangwa Zakaria.
English: There was a priest named Zechariah.

Lulogooli: Kutura ku avinyumba yu musaalisi Abija.
English: Who belonged to the priestly order of Abijah.
His wife's name was Elizabeth.

Lulogooli: Yaali mulala ku avakaana vi kisukururwi chu Musaalisi Haruni.
English: She also belonged to a priestly family.

Lulogooli: Vosi vaali avalungi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: They both lived good lives in God's sight.

Lulogooli: Vatia ligali nokolonda malago na makuva gu Mwami vugira imbara.
English: They obeyed fully all the Lord's laws and commands.
They had no children.
Elizabeth could not have any (she was barren).
They were both very old.

Lulogooli: Lidiku lilala Zakaria yaali naakoraa miyinzi ju vusaalisi imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: One day Zechariah was doing his work as a priest in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Mu Litembeli kuli lilohiza lia vuli lidiku lialange.
English: Taking his turn in the daily service.

Lulogooli: Yatovolwa nikura kuli mwima gwu vusaalisi.
English: He was chosen by lot to burn incense.
So he went into the Temple of the Lord.
To burn incense on the altar.

Lulogooli: Kiduma kenene chavandu vaali ni vasaala ichova ing'inga yukusaamba kimuli.
English: The crowd of people outside prayed during the hour when the incense was burned.
An angel of the Lord appeared to him.

Lulogooli: Nasingiyi ku mukono mulungi gwu vwali.
English: Standing at the right side of the altar.
Where the incense was burned.

Lulogooli: Lwa Zakaria yamulola, yahenda mwoyo kandi naatia ligali.
English: When Zechariah saw him, he was alarmed and felt afraid.
But the angel said to him, Don't be afraid, Zechariah!
God has heard your prayer.

Lulogooli: Mukali woovo Sabeti alakwivulira mwana muyaayi.
English: Your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son.
You are to name him John.
How glad and happy you will be.

Lulogooli: Avandu vanyingi valakasangala ku liivulwa lilie.
English: How happy many others will be when he is born!
John will be great in the Lord's sight.

Lulogooli: Si alinwa iwaini anoho amalwa mba.
English: He must not drink any wine or strong drink.

Lulogooli: Aliizula Roho Mutakatifu kutura munda mwa mama weve.
English: From his very birth he will be filled with the Holy Spirit.

Lulogooli: Aliranyia avanyingi ku avandu va Isiraeli ku Mwami Nyasaye wavo.
English: He will bring back many of the people of Israel to the Lord their God.

Lulogooli: Alimiira imbiri wu Mwami weve nu mwoyo kandi ni zinguru.
English: He will go ahead of the Lord, strong and mighty.

Lulogooli: Alakahambanyie avababa na avana vaavo kandi.
English: He will bring fathers and children together again.

Lulogooli: Alalomba avibaali na avatatiizaa Nyasaye vaganagane.
English: He will turn disobedient people back to the way of thinking of the righteous.
He will get the Lord's people ready for him.

Lulogooli: Zakaria yateeva Engelosi, Inzi ndamanya ndi amakuva yaga?
English: Zechariah said to the angel, How shall I know if this is so?

Lulogooli: Inzi mbeeye musakulu na mukali wange yakeera.
English: I am an old man, and my wife is old also.

Lulogooli: Inzi mbeeye Gabirieli usingiraa imbiri wa Nyasaye.
English: I am Gabriel, I stand in the presence of God.
I was sent to speak to you.
I bring you this good news.
Behold, you will be silent (mute).
You will be unable to speak until the day these things happen.
Because you have not believed my message.
In the meantime the people were waiting for Zechariah.

Lulogooli: Vagenya ku lilindagilira lilie mu Litembeli.
English: They wondered why he was spending such a long time in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Lwa yatura ichova, siyaali anyala komoloma navo mba.
English: When he came out, he could not speak to them.

Lulogooli: Vamanya ndi aloli malola mu Litembeli.
English: They knew that he had seen a vision in the Temple.

Lulogooli: Yagelagela vuzwa makono ma namenya naveeye idimbidi.
English: Unable to say a word, he made signs to them with his hands.

Lulogooli: Lwa yamala madiku geege guvutumiki mu Litembeli yirana yengo weve.
English: When his period of service in the Temple was over, he went back home.

Lulogooli: Inyima wa madiku yago, mukali weve, Sabeti yavereka.
English: Some time later his wife Elizabeth became pregnant.
She did not leave the house for five months.

Lulogooli: Kalunu Mwami amali kumanyia zimbavasi zizie ku inzi.
English: Now at last the Lord has helped me (shown mercy).

Lulogooli: Anduliziyi zisoni ziambezaa nazio imbiri wa vandu.
English: He has taken away my public disgrace!

Lulogooli: Mu mweli gwa sita Sabeti naveeye ninda.
English: In the sixth month Elizabeth was pregnant.

Lulogooli: Engelosi Gabirieli yatumwa na Nyasaye kuzia Nazareti.
English: God sent the angel Gabriel to Nazareth.
A town in Galilee.

Lulogooli: Yaali na makuva ku mukaana mugima, uwalangwa Maria.
English: To a young woman (virgin) named Mary.

Lulogooli: Uwaali niyateevwa koleetwa nu mundu mulala uwalangwa Josefu.
English: Who was promised in marriage to a man named Joseph.
A descendant of King David.

Lulogooli: Engelosi yazia kuye namuvolera, Mirembe Maria!
English: The angel came to her and said, Peace be with you (Greetings Mary)!
The Lord is with you and has greatly blessed you!
The Lord is with you.

Lulogooli: Lwa Maria yahulira amakuva yaga, yaahenda mwoyo ligali.
English: Mary was deeply troubled by the angel's message.

Lulogooli: Yaganagana mumwoyo ichi licheliza yili livoora!
English: She wondered what his words meant!
The angel said to her, Don't be afraid, Mary.
God has been gracious to you.

Lulogooli: Henza! Ivi ulavereka na ulivuula mwana muyaayi.
English: Behold! You will become pregnant and give birth to a son.
You will name him Jesus.
He will be great and will be called the Son.

Lulogooli: Muyaayi wa Nyasaye Oveeye igulu Ligali.
English: The Son of the Most High God.

Lulogooli: Mwami Nyasaye alakamukole alave Mwami kuli guuga weve Daudi.
English: The Lord God will make him a king, as his ancestor David was.

Lulogooli: Alakamiihi ku avandu va Isiraeli mihiga ni mihiga.
English: He will be the king of the descendants of Jacob forever.
His kingdom will never end!

Lulogooli: Maria yateeva engelosi, Yaga galanyalika ndi?
English: Mary said to the angel, How can this be?
Since I am a virgin?
The Holy Spirit will come on you.

Lulogooli: Zinguru zia Nyasaye oveeye igulu Ligali zilakukinga kuli kiriri.
English: The power of the Most High God will rest upon you.

Lulogooli: Mwana wa ulivuula alakalangwe Mutakatifu, Mwana wa Nyasaye.
English: The holy child will be called the Son of God.

Lulogooli: Umanye kali Sabeti mwiko woovo, umali kovereka mwana muyaayi.
English: Remember your relative Elizabeth, she is also pregnant with a son.

Lulogooli: Yigu nu mweli gwigwe gwa sita.
English: This is her sixth month.
Though she was called barren.

English: For there is nothing that God cannot do.

Lulogooli: Henza inzi mbeeye mutumikiri wu Mwami.

Blessed is the child you will bear!
